name: Auto Repair Claim
description: Insurance claim form for auto repairs with itemized costs

schema_fields.name: claim_items
schema_fields.description: List of claimed items with descriptions and costs

item_name.name: item_name
item_name.description: Name of the damaged item (e.g., Front Bumper, Hood)

description.name: description
description.description: Description of damage or work needed

schema_fields.name: total_estimate
schema_fields.description: Total estimated cost from all items
